scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r --filter "@agrune/*" --if-present run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "@agrune/*" --if-present run build && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" --if-present run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" --if-present run build
scripts.build:cli: pnpm -r build && mkdir -p packages/cli/assets && cp -r packages/mcp-server/dist packages/cli/assets/mcp-server && pnpm -C packages/cli build
